# scalegrid_clusters (Data Source)

Lists all ScaleGrid clusters of a given database engine.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database` (String) Database engine: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.

### Read-Only

- `clusters` (Attributes List) The matching clusters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clusters))

<a id="nestedatt--clusters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clusters`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_type` (String) Topology.
- `disk_size_gb` (Number) Disk size in GB.
- `encryption_enabled` (Boolean) Whether encryption at rest is enabled.
- `id` (String) Cluster ID.
- `name` (String) Cluster name.
- `size` (String) Instance size tier.
- `ssl_enabled` (Boolean) Whether SSL is enabled.
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status.
- `version` (String) Engine version.
